generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind cycloidal gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current (I_M) data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ) data from sensor measurements and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) data from position encoder measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived velocity data from position encoder measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity output for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor and cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata of first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyAnalysisService
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulating friction models and motor/gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of white-box and black-box friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of data traces and model outputs in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated analysis of physical relationships to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification results used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison of simulated vs. measured data for dynamic friction compensation optimization"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from comparing simulated vs. measured data to optimize parameters for dynamic friction compensation"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller driving permanent magnet synchronous motor through gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox components"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining applications"
    base:contains SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical system data streams; all data processing and model updates occur continuously during robot operation without fixed intervals, enabling live friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural SysML models, Simulink-based simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and processing components that generate data traces; visualization occurs in a unified dashboard where all elements are linked for traceability of data origins and computational processes."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') with continuous data collection and model refinement during active robot use to account for wear, tool changes, and application-specific variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data; multi-physics-aware friction models validated against real-time operational data to ensure accuracy in motion control, with error quantification via comparison of simulated vs. reference torque/angular velocity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow; no other network protocols specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial digital twins and SysML for systems engineering modeling as per industry best practices."
]
